original: This traditional-style backpack is anything but traditional in construction. Instead of fabric, it is woven from an exotic spun metal. It has at least ten different pouches in addition to the sizeable main compartment. The straps are padded for comfort and lined with a nanite-infused sweat-wicking system to keep you clean, dry, and comfortable on the move.\n\n(Using this item will raise your base inventory slots to 15 if not yet upgraded, consuming this item in the process. It will not have any effect on larger inventories.)
